{{Infobox location
| name = Trackless Sea
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

''See also: [[Trackless Sea Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Trackless Sea is a massive, endless ocean located to the north of the [[Blackflame Empire]]. According to maps, it is the widest known ocean and covers approximately half of the world. While some stretches of the sea are unremarkable, other regions contain cities, nations, and various buildings that either hang from solidified clouds or emerge from the waves. The ocean is home to diverse and dangerous entities, including walking sharks on its beaches, vicious water-spirits, and storm-dragons—which are constructions of the [[Dreadgod]] that inhabit the lightning-filled storm clouds above. The sea is also a site of significant conflict and strategic importance. The [[Kotai clan]] maintains a defensive wall to protect the empire from various ocean tribes that seek to claim land. The area has been a theater for battles involving powerful figures and clans, such as the [[Akura]] family and [[Redmoon Hall]]. Beneath the surface lies a [[labyrinth]] that connects to different locations, including the pocket world of [[Ghostwater]]. The ocean's environment can be highly volatile, featuring spatial cracks that leak water from the [[void]] and massive disruptions caused by entities like the [[Wandering Titan]].}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Trackless Sea]] has beaches with walking sharks.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c22">''Blackflame'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Trackless Sea]] is a location that requires a three-day journey to reach.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c2">''Ghostwater'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Trackless Sea]] is a location mentioned by [[Naru Saeya]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Sage of the Silver Heart]] is on an [[island]] in the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c19">''Ghostwater'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Attacks from the [[Trackless Sea]] in the north have intensified.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c4">''Underlord'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|The [[Bleeding Phoenix]] is flying into the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Natarianath]] protected her kingdom from the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c10">''Dreadgod'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[Trackless Sea]] is located in the far north of the [[Ashwind continent]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Trackless Sea serves as the setting for [[Lindon]]'s drift across its waters. Within this region, [[Windfall]] is situated and the [[Dreadgod]] is intended to be fought. The depths of the sea contain the [[Sunken Tower]], while the endless expanse above witnessed the reappearance of [[Northstrider]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] drifts over the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c5">''Waybound'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] intends to fight the [[Dreadgod]] over the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c9">''Waybound'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Trackless Sea]] is a location where [[Windfall]] is situated.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c12">''Waybound'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Sunken Tower]] is located at the bottom of the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23">''Waybound'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Northstrider]] reappeared over an endless expanse of ocean in the [[Trackless Sea]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c23" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
